name: Implantable Therapy Tag
blurb: RFID tags embedded in tissue trigger gene therapy doses on wireless command.

name: Smart Battery Custody Chain
blurb: RFID tags on LFP cells log charge cycles and thermal history throughout their lifespan.

name: Superfluid Circulating Biopsy
blurb: Zero-viscosity superfluid analogs carry tumor-DNA sensors through microchannels without clogging.

name: Frictionless Orbital Coolant Loop
blurb: Superfluid helium loops dissipate satellite waste heat with zero pumping energy loss.

name: Tether Traffic Orchestrator
blurb: Foundation models schedule cargo climber queues on a space elevator in real time.

name: Continuous Identity Inference

name: On-Chain Model Provenance

name: Adaptive Battery Chemistry Tuner

name: Cryo-Revival Protocol Planner

name: Recursive AI Self-Delegation
blurb: Intelligent agents continuously spawn and supervise sub-agents, bootstrapping increasingly capable AI systems.

name: Scan-Triggered Diagnostic Agent

name: Cold Fusion Hypothesis Hunter

name: AGI Goal Negotiation Layer
blurb: Intelligent agents mediate between human objectives and AGI sub-goals to prevent value drift.

name: Ambient Agent Wearable Hub
blurb: Wearable device runs a persistent intelligent agent that acts on sensor context throughout the day.

name: Negotiating Intersection Agent
blurb: Autonomous agents in each vehicle bargain over shared intersections without central traffic signals.

name: Nano-Printed Perovskite Arrays
blurb: Nanoscale printing deposits perovskite absorber layers with atom-level thickness control for record efficiency.

name: Nano-Shielded Modular Core
blurb: Nanostructured cladding inside small modular reactors captures fission products before they reach coolant.

name: Dynamic Expert Routing AI
blurb: AI systems self-modify their mixture-of-experts routing weights during inference for novel problem types.

name: Geothermal Organism Cloning Bank
blurb: Heat-tolerant cloned extremophiles inoculate geothermal brine loops to prevent mineral-fouling scale buildup.

name: Photonic Clone Verification
blurb: Photonic chips optically fingerprint cloned embryos in milliseconds, confirming genetic identity without sequencing.

name: Reactor Dose Glucose Monitor
blurb: Continuous glucose sensors adapted for radiation workers track cumulative dose via metabolic biomarker shifts.

name: Nuclear-Powered Carbon Capture
blurb: Direct air capture fans and sorbent regeneration run entirely on zero-carbon nuclear baseload power.

name: Geothermal Formation Mapper

name: Deep-Earth Fusion Catalyst
blurb: Geothermal pressure and temperature gradients provide the confinement conditions for room-temperature fusion experiments.

name: Subsurface Reservoir Intelligence
blurb: AGI optimizes geothermal field drawdown rates to extend reservoir life by decades.

name: Wearable Geothermal Patch
blurb: Body-heat harvesting wearable draws on the same thermoelectric physics as geothermal power plants.

name: Geothermal Road-Heated Autonomy

name: Thermal Gene Delivery Fax

name: Quantum Agent Coordination
